allow: Bash(node -e "const crypto = require\('crypto'\); const {privateKey, publicKey} = crypto.generateKeyPairSync\('ec', {namedCurve:'P-256'}\); const pub = publicKey.export\({type:'spki',format:'der'}\); const priv = privateKey.export\({type:'pkcs8',format:'der'}\); const b64url = b => Buffer.from\(b\).toString\('base64'\).replace\(/\\+/g,'-'\).replace\(/\\//g,'_'\).replace\(/=/g,''\); console.log\('PUBLIC_VAPID:', b64url\(pub.slice\(-65\)\)\); console.log\('PRIVATE_VAPID:', b64url\(priv.slice\(-32\)\)\);")
